productDisplayName: Jockey Signature Stretch Red Bra SS 12
description: Red medium-coverage bra, has non-padded non-wired moulded seamless cups, elasticated and adjustable shoulder straps, elasticated along the bustline, hook-and-eye closures on the back for an adjustable fit Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
